osteopathy.title: Osteopathy
osteopathy.intro: Osteopathy is a regulated allied health profession that specialises in musculoskeletal issues. An osteopath needs four to five years of full-time training covering subjects including Anatomy, physiology, pathology, pharmacology, neuroscience, pain science, clinical reasoning and practice.
osteopathy.conditionsNote: Any age from infants to seniors can benefit from osteopathy treatment.

acupuncture.title: Medical Acupuncture
acupuncture.intro: Medical Acupuncture is a modern evidence-based treatment that merges traditional acupuncture techniques with contemporary medical knowledge. By stimulating specific points on the body, it promotes the flow of energy, releases tension, and activates the body's natural pain and stress mechanisms.

sports.title: Sports Rehabilitation
sports.intro: Our dedicated team is committed to restoring your strength, flexibility, and stability, ensuring a safe and effective return to your favourite activities. With tailored exercise programs and a holistic approach, we'll guide you every step of the way towards optimal performance.
